# Outlaw Mercenaries

#### Hive Mercenaries

* 0-1 Awakened Ogryn (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Deep Hive Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory) Necromunda Gang or Helot Cult Only  
* 0-3 Hired Gun (Cost: 2-3 Glory)  
* 0-2 Hive Scum (Cost: 1 Glory) Necromunda Gang or Helot Cult Only  
* 0-1 Jotunn Servitor Ogryn (Cost: 3 Glory) Necromunda Gang or Helot Cult Only

#### Hive Beast Mercenaries

* 0-2 Giant Rat (Cost: 1 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang (House Cawdor)  
* 0-2 Grapplehawk (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gyrinx Cat (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Sump Beast (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Robot Mercenaries

* 0-1 Ambot (Cost: 5 Glory)  
* 0-1 Hacked Cyber Mastiff (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang (House Orlock)  
* 0-1 Iron Automata (Cost: 5 Glory)

#### Wasteland Beast Mercenaries

Max 1 type of BEAST per Outland Beast Master, plus 1 for Ash Waste Nomads.

* 0-2 Outland Beast Master (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-2 Borewyrm Swarm (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-1 Giant Grapplehawk (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-3 Giant Wasteland Rat (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-3 Millisaur (Cost: 2 Glory)  
* 0-3 Ripperjack (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Ambull (Cost: 5 Glory)

#### Other Outlaw Mercenaries

* 0-1 Barghesi Thrall (Cost: 2 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang  
* 0-1 Barghesi Raider (Cost: 5 Glory) Unavailable to Necromunda Gang  
* 0-1 Beastman Bounty Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Freebooter (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Pirate Crew  
* 0-1 Kroot Skinner (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Pirate Crew  
* 0-1 Piscean Ambusher (Cost: 3 Glory) Unavailable to Pirate Crew  
* 0-1 Tarellian Bounty Hunter (Cost: 4 Glory)  
* 0-1 Zoat Archivist (Cost: 6 Glory)

#### Imperial: Military Mercenaries

* 0-1 Ratling Sniper (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Imperial: Mars Mercenaries

* 0-1 Combat Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Gun Servitor (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Imperial: Space Marine Mercenaries

* 0-1 Techmarine (Cost: 5 Glory) Renegade Space Marines Only

#### Imperial: Other Mercenaries

* 0-1 Navigator (Cost: 3 Glory) Pirate Crew Only

#### Chaos: Other Chaos Mercenaries

* 0-1 Unsanctioned Psyker (Cost: 3 Glory)

#### Xenos: Aeldari, Drukhari, and Harlequin Mercenaries

* 0-1 Corsair Shade Runner (Cost: 3 Glory)  
* 0-1 Corsair Soul Weaver (Cost: 4 Glory)

#### Xenos: Slanni Mercenaries

* 0-1 Hrud (Cost: 6 Glory) Pirate Crew (no Variant) Only

#### Xenos: T’au Empire Mercenaries

* 0-1 Kroot Bounty Hunter (Cost: 3 Glory)
